description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped natural rock with a rough, weathered surface and a predominantly gray coloration. The rock stands upright, with one side appearing broader and flatter, while the opposite side is more narrow and angular. Its surface is pitted and uneven, featuring small crevices and protrusions typical of sedimentary or volcanic stone. The base of the rock is surrounded by a patch of green grass, suggesting it is situated outdoors. There are no visible carvings, graffiti, or artificial modifications on its surface. The rock's substantial size and mass make it a prominent obstacle or natural barrier in an open, grassy area.
description: A large, rough, gray natural rock with an irregular, weathered surface, standing upright on a patch of grass.
description_view_0: The rock appears broad and flat with a rugged, pitted surface and a wide grassy base.
description_view_1: This side shows the rock as tall and narrow, with pronounced vertical ridges and a smaller grassy footprint.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a rounded, slightly smoother surface with subtle discoloration and a wider grassy area.
description_view_3: From this angle, the rock looks angular and blocky, with deep crevices and a shadowed base.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped green space
